Description: Help Simon toast the perfect marshmallow for a s'more. For 4 stages, use the color of the flashing log and the transmitting morse character to enter a new morse character on the correct log. Tags: 6-logs, campfire, 7-buttons, dirt-background, morse-code
Name: Simon s'Morse

Souvenir.Explanation: Souvenir could ask what color was flashing for each stage or what character was transmitted in morse code for each stage.
